commit.message:
feat: fallback keywords for products without advertising

- Auto-adds category-based keywords for products without advertising keywords
- Strategy: category keywords → generic sportkleding keywords → competitor keywords
- Runs automatically after advertising keyword populate in main sync
- Per-category keyword sets (sportlegging, sportshirts, sport-bhs, etc.)
- Limits to 50 products per sync to avoid timeout
- Source tagged as 'category_analysis' for tracking

All products now get keywords - no manual intervention needed!

Update cri-o configs to use rhel-coreos instead of rhel-coreos-9 (#75803)

rhel-coreos. Update base_images, inputs, and output image references
in both main and release-4.22 configurations to match.

Fix all P0/P1 from brainstorming: hero, numbers, SEO, accessibility, FR proofreading

P0 bugs:
- Fix duplicate class attribute on hero badge (line 47)
- Add Open Graph + Twitter Card meta tags
- Fix terminal overflow on mobile (overflow-x: auto)
- Fix color contrast --text-muted (#52525b → #71717a) for WCAG AA

Hero rework:
- Gradient text: "Own Every Layer" (slogan promoted from footer to hero)
- FR: "IA. Ingénierie. Analytique. Maîtrisez chaque couche."
- Subtitle rewritten: shorter, punchier, cloud-agnostic angle

Number corrections (verified against source code):
- 26 → 25+ services
- 21 → 20 VS Code extensions
- 14 → 13 OAuth clients
- 4 → 5 RBAC roles
- 6 GB → 8 GB RAM minimum
- "Clone to Production" → "From Zero to Running"
- "row-level access control" → "table-level access control"
- "Zero infra team needed" → "No dedicated infra team to get started"

SEO:
- Meta description: inject "self-hosted", "lakehouse", "Docker Compose"
- Remove "platform" from meta + use cases
- Features subtitle: "self-hosted open source lakehouse"
- Optimize Google Fonts (drop unused weights 300, 900)
- Add theme-color meta tag

French proofreading (4 medium errors):
- "curatées" → "qualifiées" (non-existent anglicism)
- "rendus en rapport" → "générés sous forme de rapport" (calque)
- "Les projets upstream purs des" → "Des projets upstream purs, issus des"
- "analyst" → "analyste" (between French guillemets)
- "laptop" → "portable"
- "21" → "20" in FR use cases
- "Engineering" → "Ingénierie" in FR hero

Section improvements:
- Add heading to Problem section ("The Challenge" / "Le défi")
- CTA rework: "One command. Twenty-five services. Total independence."

commit.message:
perf(sysinfo): 3.5x speedup with static model map and selective fetching

Replace slow system_profiler SPHardwareDataType call (~90ms) with a static
hw.model lookup table. Use instant CPU load snapshot instead of 200ms sleep.
Refactor Collect() to accept key filter so --show skips unneeded fetchers.

Full readouts: ~700ms → ~200ms. Filtered queries: ~26ms.

section now only contains the Follow-up Question. Negative Phrases
input changed from newline-separated to comma-separated for consistency
with all other fields. Updated hint text for clarity.

Fix light mode tab bar on iOS 26 LiquidGlass path

LiquidGlassView respects iOS system dark mode, not the app's custom
theme. When system is dark but app theme is light, the glass renders
dark. Add a light overlay (rgba(235,235,240,0.82)) on the LiquidGlass
path when isDark=false to correct the appearance.

commit.message:
fix(web): hide callback paste step when OAuth has autoCallback (#324)

When autoCallback is true (Claude auth login, Gemini), the CLI
handles the OAuth redirect internally. The web UI was always
showing the "paste callback URL" step regardless, confusing users
who saw an authentication code on the page instead.

Now when autoCallback=true, the UI shows a "waiting for auth..."
indicator instead of the paste form, and completes automatically
when the CLI finishes.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add one-liner bootstrap install script

curl -sSL .../bootstrap.sh | sudo bash handles everything: installs
git if needed, clones the repo, fixes ownership, and runs the full
install script. Eliminates the chicken-and-egg problem of needing git
to clone the repo that contains the install script.

commit.message:
Fix exchange rate cron disappearing after deactivation cycles

The refresh cron was only scheduled in register_activation_hook. If WordPress
cleared it (deactivation, options reset, cron cleanup), rates went stale with
no recovery path. The init hook now re-schedules automatically when the event
is missing. Bump to 1.1.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial Impossible FX SDK v3 - Render API client for 5 languages

Multi-language SDK for the Impossible FX Render API v2 with support for:
- TypeScript/Node.js (native fetch, ESM+CJS)
- Python (httpx, dataclasses)
- Java (java.net.http, Jackson, Gradle)
- Go (net/http, functional options)
- Rust (reqwest, serde, builder pattern)

Each SDK implements: render, createToken, getUrl, getProgress, and full
batch operations (create, addTasks, run, status, results, cancel).
Includes 2 examples per language (simple render + batch workflow).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Don't mark failed analysis items as enriched — allow retry on API recovery

Previously, items where OpenAI analysis returned null (e.g., quota exceeded,
API errors) were marked with ImageAnalyzedAt, permanently preventing retry.
Now only successfully analyzed items get the timestamp.

Add Supabase cache layer for JT data with sync engine

Introduces a cache-first architecture so agents can access all JT data
without hitting API pagination limits. Includes cache tables, sync
endpoints (hourly cron + on-demand deep sync), cached read functions,
and write-through helpers. Both agents migrated to use cached reads.

commit.message:
fix: start save interval when video is already playing on init

If the video was already playing when the content script initializes
(common due to retry delays and YouTube's SPA auto-play), the play/
loadedmetadata events won't fire again, leaving the interval unset.
Check paused state after attaching listeners and start immediately if needed.

commit.message:
Add trade protection gates, signal confirmation delay, and spread check

Trading logic:
- Min profit exit (0.6%) prevents selling at a loss unless sell confidence > 80%
- Min hold time (5m) blocks premature signal-sells
- Bid-ask spread check (0.3%) skips buys when spread is too wide
- Signal confirmation delay: 60% of trades wait 2 cycles for signal persistence
- Dynamic scalp cooldown: extends cooldown on repeated buy-sell cycles per pair
- All parameters are AI-tunable via strategy.json

Dashboard:
- Trade list no longer auto-scrolls, newest trades shown at top
- 6 new AI parameter sliders for the new trading gates
- AI params card visual improvements (accent border, header background)
- Fix stale "running" LLM status persisting across restarts
- Simplify LLM scheduler startup delay
- Dangerous commands (pause/sell/kill) now require confirmation dialogs
- Deploy script fixed for submodule-based repo structure

feat: 페이월 바이패스 시스템 구현 + 자식 워크플로우 문서 동기화 (ADR-054~057)

크롤링 엔진에 하드 페이월 사이트(FT, NYTimes, WSJ, Bloomberg, Le Monde) 대응
시스템을 구현하고, 자식 워크플로우 문서 6개 + 프레임워크 문서 2개를 동기화.

코드 변경:
- BrowserRenderer: 서브프로세스 Patchright/Playwright, fresh context, 사이트별
  3회 연속 실패 시 early bail-out
- AdaptiveExtractor: exec() 완전 제거(P1-3), 4-stage CSS 선택자 전용
- is_paywall_body(): Strong/Weak 2단계 패턴 분류 (14 strong + 12 weak, EN+FR)
- article_extractor.py: 페이월 브랜치 통합 (crawl_tier=3/5, crawl_method 보존)
- pipeline.py: effective_method에 "adaptive"+"playwright" 보존

문서 동기화:
- GLOBALNEWS-ARCHITECTURE: §3.5 페이월 바이패스 시스템 신설, 7-Tier 에스컬레이션
- GLOBALNEWS-README: D1 페이월 바이패스 설명, 모듈 구조 갱신
- GLOBALNEWS-USER-MANUAL: 설치에 Patchright 추가, 크롤링 흐름도 갱신, 트러블슈팅 3건
- DECISION-LOG: ADR-054~057 (BrowserRenderer, AdaptiveExtractor, is_paywall_body, 실패 카운터)
- README: 도메인 고유 변이에 Paywall Bypass System 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(onboarding): use fetchQuery instead of invalidateQueries on approve — prevents redirect loop

invalidateQueries marks cache stale but does not refetch when no active observer is mounted
(OnboardingGate is not rendered at /avatar-setup). Cache stays null, OnboardingGate redirects
back to /avatar-setup on navigate('/chat'). fetchQuery forces a real GET /avatars/me call and
populates the cache before navigation, so OnboardingGate sees the avatar immediately.

commit.message:
fix: remove rule sync/learning, fix manage rules UI navigation (#44)

Remove the concept of "learned" rules that synced permissions from
worktree settings.local.json files. AM now only tracks rules explicitly
added via `am rule add`. Also fixes navigation bugs in the Manage Rules
sub-view where arrow keys and delete could crash on empty lists or
cause negative index.

- Remove syncRulesFromWorktrees, clearLearnedRules, parseClaudePermissionRule,
  generateRulesDiffFiles from rules.ts
- Remove rule sync polling and learned-rules cleanup from useWorktrees
- Remove `rule sync` CLI subcommand; simplify `rule clear` to remove all rules
- Remove source column from rule list output and [source] tag from UI
- Remove "Clear Learned Rules" settings field
- Fix empty-list guard and index clamping in manage rules input handler
